name: doctoral-brain
description: A personal knowledge management plugin and large set of skills and tools for doctoral students.

skills.name: research-gap
skills.description: Identify white space in a field by analyzing literature clusters, methodological blind spots, population gaps, and temporal gaps.

skills.name: problem-statement
skills.description: Craft a tight, scholarly problem statement aligned with the gap and grounded in evidence.

skills.name: research-questions
skills.description: Generate and refine central and sub-questions that are answerable, bounded, and aligned with methodology.

skills.name: literature-review
skills.description: Plan, structure, and write a literature review using thematic, chronological, or conceptual frameworks.

skills.name: source-synthesis
skills.description: Extract themes, tensions, and convergences across multiple sources.

skills.name: methodology
skills.description: Select and justify a research methodology aligned with the problem, questions, and epistemological stance.

skills.name: theoretical-framework
skills.description: Identify, explain, and apply a theoretical or conceptual framework to anchor the study.

skills.name: dissertation-outline
skills.description: Scaffold a full dissertation using standard chapter conventions with section-level guidance.

skills.name: chapter-draft
skills.description: Generate scholarly first drafts of any dissertation chapter using the learner's inputs.

skills.name: apa-citations
skills.description: Format citations and references in APA 7th edition.

skills.name: peer-review-response
skills.description: Draft point-by-point responses to committee or peer reviewer feedback.

skills.name: academic-voice
skills.description: Edit or rewrite content for scholarly register, hedging, objectivity, and precision.

skills.name: argument-builder
skills.description: Evaluate and strengthen the logical structure of a scholarly argument.

skills.name: abstract-writer
skills.description: Generate structured abstracts for dissertations, journals, and conferences.

skills.name: concept-explainer
skills.description: Translate complex academic concepts into clear language, then back into scholarly prose.

skills.name: dissertation-timeline
skills.description: Build a realistic, week-by-week dissertation timeline with milestones and checkpoints.

skills.name: writing-session-plan
skills.description: Structure a focused writing session with goals, warm-up, deep work blocks, and a wrap-up review.

skills.name: weekly-review
skills.description: Run a structured weekly review: what was completed, what slipped, what's next, and what needs adjustment.

skills.name: goal-setting
skills.description: Define and prioritize doctoral goals at the semester, month, and week level.

skills.name: reading-plan
skills.description: Build a curated, time-bound reading plan aligned with the current phase of the dissertation.

skills.name: writing-habit
skills.description: Design a sustainable daily writing practice with accountability structures and streak-building tactics.

skills.name: motivation-reset
skills.description: Reorient the learner to their purpose, values, and progress using structured reflection prompts.

skills.name: procrastination-audit
skills.description: Diagnose the root cause of procrastination and prescribe a specific, low-friction next action.

skills.name: deep-focus-protocol
skills.description: Run a structured pre-session focus protocol: environment, intention, constraints, and a commitment device.

skills.name: energy-management
skills.description: Map the learner's energy patterns to high-value doctoral tasks to protect peak cognition.

skills.name: celebrate-progress
skills.description: Acknowledge and anchor progress with a deliberate, structured celebration to build doctoral identity.

skills.name: note-to-insight
skills.description: Transform rough reading notes into structured, linked insight artifacts.

skills.name: concept-map
skills.description: Generate a textual concept map showing relationships between key constructs in the study.

skills.name: knowledge-gap-journal
skills.description: Maintain a running journal of open questions and knowledge gaps to drive purposeful reading.

skills.name: source-log
skills.description: Build and maintain an annotated source log with relevance ratings and synthesis notes.

skills.name: idea-capture
skills.description: Quickly format and file a raw idea into a retrievable, linkable knowledge artifact.
